channel.title: Androscoggin County Probate Court
channel.description: No probate-specific news/RSS feed exists at any of the 16 counties; monitored by full-page fingerprint of the official probate court page. No dedicated news page; monitors staff/contact/service-description content.

item.title: Monitoring started: Androscoggin County Probate Court
item.description: This source is being monitored for changes. No update has been detected yet; a new item will appear here the next time the page changes. This placeholder confirms the feed is live.
